items.title: MSCA Seal of Excellence — NoRMLLM (Normative Reasoning in Large Language Models)
items.organization: European Commission (Marie Skłodowska-Curie Actions Postdoctoral Fellowships)
items.description: Awarded the prestigious 🏆 Seal of Excellence 🏆 with a ~95% score (94.6/100) for the MSCA-PF proposal NoRMLLM. The proposal received 5.0/5.0 in the implementation criterion, 4.7/5.0 in excellence, and 4.6/5.0 in impact.

items.title: Best Paper Award — 🏆 ICAIL 2026 🏆
items.organization: International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Law (ACM ICAIL)
items.description: Awarded for the paper "Addressing the Right to Explanation and the Right to Challenge through Hybrid-AI: Symbolic Constraints over Large Language Models via Prompt Engineering".

items.title: Winner — UN General Assembly Resolutions Automatic Information Extraction and Knowledge Elicitation
items.description: First place in the international competition for automatic extraction and knowledge elicitation from UN General Assembly Resolutions.

ADDITIONAL.title: Very Positive Evaluation — DeLiMit-LLM-NormS (MSCA-PF)
ADDITIONAL.description: Second MSCA-PF attempt received a very positive evaluation score of 81.0/100, almost reaching the Seal of Excellence threshold. Scored 5.0/5.0 in impact and 4.0/5.0 in implementation.

ADDITIONAL.title: LAMORE Project — Funding Recommendation by International Scientific Panel
ADDITIONAL.description: The project LAMORE (Language Models For Legal Reasoning) was recommended for funding by an international scientific panel on behalf of the FNR with a very positive score.

ADDITIONAL.title: Positive Evaluation — ELENORA (MSCA-PF)
ADDITIONAL.description: First MSCA-PF attempt for the project ELENORA received a positive evaluation score of 74.4/100 in the highly competitive MSCA Postdoctoral Fellowship. Scored 4.40/5.00 in impact and 4.00/5.00 in implementation.
